title: GL Sparkly Sequin Hair Set – Transform Your Hairstyle with Easy-to-Apply Sequins, Includes Hair Applicator, Comb, Storage Stand, Assorted Sequins & Stickers – Creative Hair Styling Kit for Girls
features: Transform Your Hairstyle – The GL Sparkly Sequin Hair Set allows girls to add a touch of glamour to their hair with vibrant, easy-to-apply sequins for stunning and personalized styles.

Complete Styling Kit – This all-in-one kit includes a hair applicator, storage stand for sequins, a hair comb, a variety of sequins, and 2 fun stickers, providing everything needed for creative hair designs.
User-Friendly Application – Designed for young stylists, the included applicator simplifies the process of attaching sequins, making it easy for kids to achieve beautiful results with minimal effort.

Perfect for Creative Expression – Ideal for girls who love experimenting with their look, this sequin hair set inspires creativity and imagination, making it perfect for special occasions or everyday fun.
Clear Instructions Included – The set comes with straightforward instructions, ensuring that even beginners can start styling their hair effortlessly and create dazzling hairstyles in no time.
description: Elevate your hairstyle with the GL Sparkly Sequin Hair Set! This fun and creative kit allows girls to add vibrant sequins to their hair, creating dazzling and personalized looks. Featuring an easy-to-use applicator, assorted sequins, a hair comb, and a storage stand, this set provides everything needed for stunning hairstyles. Perfect for special occasions or everyday fun, it inspires creativity and self-expression. Clear instructions make it simple for young stylists to achieve beautiful results effortlessly. Unleash your sparkle today!

specifications_table.Included Components: hair applicator, storage stand for sequins, hair comb, assorted sequins, 2 fun stickers, clear instructions
